stories.headline: TOKEN2049 Dubai postponed to 2027 amid heightened UAE security risks
stories.tldr: TOKEN2049 organizers delayed the flagship Dubai conference to 2027, citing escalating security risks across the UAE region.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A premier global crypto event retreating from Dubai signals broader regional instability that could redirect institutional crypto activity away from the Gulf.
the_details: Original 2026 Dubai dates scrapped after consultations with UAE authorities and venue partners over deteriorating security conditions
TOKEN2049 Singapore in October 2026 remains on schedule and now becomes the year's marquee global gathering
Dubai stop has drawn 15,000-plus attendees in prior years, anchoring the Middle East crypto calendar

stories.headline: Bitcoin ETFs vacuum up $933M, ride 9-day streak as crypto funds hit $155B AUM
stories.tldr: Bitcoin spot ETFs pulled in $933 million last week and notched their longest inflow streak since February.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Sticky institutional demand is decoupling BTC's price floor from retail sentiment heading into a macro-heavy central bank week.
the_details: Total crypto fund AUM climbed to $155 billion, the highest level since February 2026 per CoinShares data
Spot Bitcoin ETFs logged 9 consecutive sessions of net inflows totaling more than $2 billion
Inflows accelerating despite BTC repeatedly rejecting the $80,000 resistance ceiling and slipping below $77,000

stories.headline: Fed, BoJ, ECB, BoE rate decisions converge as crypto braces for macro super-week
stories.tldr: Four major central banks set policy in a 72-hour window, with Wednesday's FOMC the highest-stakes event for risk assets.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A synchronized policy week could detonate cross-asset volatility just as BTC clings to support and ETH battles $2,400 resistance.
the_details: Federal Reserve decision lands Wednesday April 29, with traders pricing rate-path uncertainty into the front of the curve
Bank of Japan, ECB, and Bank of England all schedule rate verdicts within the same 72-hour window this week
BTC slipped below $77,000 Tuesday morning after rejecting the $79,000 breakout zone for the fourth time

stories.headline: Solana ETF inflows crash 92% from $419M peak as institutional rotation stalls
stories.tldr: Spot Solana ETF inflows dropped to $34 million in April from $419 million in November, signaling sharp institutional fatigue.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Capital is consolidating into Bitcoin while alt-ETF demand evaporates, blocking the rotation thesis altcoin bulls are pricing.
the_details: SOL trades near $86 with a $49.8 billion market cap, ranked seventh by total crypto market value
Death cross persists with the 200-day moving average at $131.2, well above current spot price
Firedancer upgrade still targets 1 million TPS, but ETF demand has not rewarded the technical roadmap

stories.headline: Ripple CTO flags sophisticated Robinhood phishing campaign targeting crypto users
stories.tldr: David Schwartz publicly warned of a polished Robinhood email phishing operation that impersonates official communications convincingly.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: With $606M already lost to crypto attacks this month, retail-facing phishing now compounds the institutional exploit wave.
the_details: Phishing emails clone Robinhood's templates, headers, and sender domains to harvest user credentials at scale
Schwartz urged users to verify all account alerts inside the Robinhood app rather than clicking email links
Attack coincides with attackers pivoting from smart-contract exploits toward social engineering and signing infrastructure
